## Temporary crop sales

```{r}
#| label: temporary crop sales table

temp_crop_sales <- fs::path(
    params$dir_data,
    paste0(params_df$temp_crop_sales_df, ".dta")
  ) |>
	haven::read_dta()

temp_crop_sales_df <- supervisor_interviewer_interview |>
	dplyr::left_join(
    y = temp_crop_sales,
    by = c("interview__id", "interview__key")
  )

tbls50x30::temp_crop_sales(
  crops_sales_df = temp_crop_sales_df,
  cases = cases_for_report,
  crop_id_var = monitor50x30:::extract_id_var_names(
    params_df$temp_crop_sales_crop_id_var
  ),
  sold_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(
    params_df$temp_crop_sales_sold_var
  ),
  sold_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(
    params_df$temp_crop_sales_sold_val
  ),
  amt_sold_vars = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(
    params_df$temp_crop_sales_amt_sold_vars[[1]]
  ),
  amt_sold_dk_val = params_df$temp_crop_sales_amt_sold_dk_val,
  group_var = "supervisor"
)
```
